data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of 'Last-touch/first-touch policy fields', but there is no evidence provided that confirms their existence or functionality. The linked use case outlines the need for these fields, yet the evidence does not include any checks or data that would validate this requirement. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the necessary information to confirm the requirement is absent.
gaps: No evidence of 'Last-touch/first-touch policy fields' being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
